text: l< CloudFormation DependsOn @ mssnemantilo ) sssncanc ¢ CloudFormation tries to be efficient ¢ .. does things in parallel (create, update & delete) e .. tries to determine a dependency order (VPC => SUBNET => EC2) ¢ .. references or functions create these * DependsOn lets you explicitly define these e .If Resources B and C depend on A e .. both wait for A to complete before starting
